MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-23-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, COURT RULING RE: PETITIONERS KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC., AND THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'S HEARING ON PETITION TO APPOINT A NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR. THE COURT NOMINATES THE FOLLOWING 5 PEOPLE FROM THE PARTIES' LISTS TO ACT AS ARBITRATOR: (1) HON. ANN KOUGH (RET.); (2) HON. JOHN FLAHERTY (RET.); (3) HON. JACK KOMAR (RET.); (4) HON. LYNN DURYEE (RET.); AND (5) HON. REBECCA WESTERFIELD (RET.). THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER TO DETERMINE WHETHER THEY CAN AGREE TO AN ARBITRATOR FROM THIS LIST. THIS MOTION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 28, 2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, FOR FURTHER HEARING AS THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE AT THIS TIME. THE COURT WILL NAME THE ARBITRATOR AT THAT TIME IF THE PARTIES ARE STILL AT AN IMPASSE. OTHERWISE, THE MOTION WILL GO OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-28-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

ORDER RE PETITIONERS' PETITION TO APPOINT NEUTRAL ARBITRAITOR

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC. THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC. HEARING SET FOR JUN-23-2014 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC. AND THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'S PETITION TO APPOINT A NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR IS CONTINUED TO JULY 18, 2014 AND JULY 28, 2014. THE PETITION TO APPOINT A NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. EACH PARTY IS REQUIRED TO SERVE AND FILE A LIST OF NOT MORE THAN FIVE PROPOSED ARBITRATOR CANDIDATES BY JULY 11, 2014. THE COURT WILL THEN MAKE A LIST OF 5 PROPOSED ARBITRATORS FROM THE SUBMITTED LIST ON JULY 18, 2014. IF THE PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON AN ARBITRATOR FROM THIS LIST BEFORE THE HEARING ON JULY 28, THEN THE COURT WILL SELECT AN ARBITRATOR ON JULY 28, 2014. THE PARTIES AT ANY TIME CAN AGREE ON AN ARBITRATOR AND NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED BY NOTIFYING THE COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC., THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'s Petition To Appoint A Neutral Arbitrator is off calendr as a duplicate entry. (302)

Petition To Appoint A Neutral Arbitrator
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as the ruling of the Court on the PETITION TO APPOINT A NEUTRAL ARBITRATOR. The court appoints the Hon. Jack Komar (Ret.) to act as the arbitrator. The Court signed the Proposed Order submitted by email. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Jul-18-2014 Continued To Jul-28-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on PETITIONERS KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC., and THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'S Hearing On Petition To Appoint A Neutral Arbitrator. The court nominates the following 5 people from the parties' lists to act as arbitrator: (1) Hon. Ann Kough (Ret.); (2) Hon. John Flaherty (Ret.); (3) Hon. Jack Komar (Ret.); (4) Hon. Lynn Duryee (Ret.); and (5) Hon. Rebecca Westerfield (Ret.). The parties are ordered to meet and confer to determine whether they can agree to an arbitrator from this list. This motion is continued to July 28, 2014 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302, for further hearing as the parties cannot agree at this time. The court will name the arbitrator at that time if the parties are still at an impasse. Otherwise, the motion will go off calendar. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Jul-18-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES E. ALLEN OF THE LAW OFFICES OF MCNAMARA, NEY. BEATTY & AMBACHER LLP, TEL. NO. (925)939-5330 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
DAVID STRICKLING, TEL. NO. (330) 412-3693, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PETITIONERS KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC. and THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'s Petition To Appoint A Neutral Arbitrator IS CONTINUED TO JULY 18, 2014 AND JULY 28, 2014. The Petition to Appoint a Neutral Arbitrator is granted. No opposition was filed. Each party is required to serve and file a list of not more than five proposed arbitrator candidates by July 11, 2014. The court will then make a list of 5 proposed arbitrators from the submitted list on July 18, 2014. If the parties cannot agree on an arbitrator from this list before the hearing on July 28, then the court will select an arbitrator on July 28, 2014. The parties at any time can agree on an arbitrator and no appearance is required by notifying the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/mjm
